note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Abscess Right cervical measures aprx 0.8 x 1.1cm, depth 0.6cm.
Min drainage serous. Heel wound also eval - L ankle 0.5x0.7, 0.3cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right cervical wound site, rates 7/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Abscess abscess Right cervical measures 0.8 cm x 1.1 cm x 0.6 cm.
  Wound bed: 26% slough, 74% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: light. Odor: none.
Assessment: Abscess abscess Right cervical — not improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Physician notified of wound progression.
